answers: Wake early, exercise daily, read 30 min, drink water, plan day, limit social media.
Build good habits by starting small: wake up early, drink more water, read a little every day, and cut screen time before bed.
Try these daily habits: morning exercise, 30 minutes of reading, meal planning, journaling, and limiting social media scrolling.
Good habits stack up over time — start with just one: wake up at the same time daily, and build from there.
